name: Golden Kringel Beet & Potato Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the carrots in boiling water for 3 to 5 minutes until tender. Drain and set aside.
2. Boil the beets in boiling water for 8 to 12 minutes until tender. Drain, peel, chop into small cubes and set aside.
3. Boil the potatoes in their jackets in boiling water for about 20 to 30 minutes until tender but slightly firm. Drain, peel and cut into small cubes.
4. In a large bowl, combine the cubed potatoes, carrots, and beets. Add the chopped onion, pickles, and herring. Mix well.
5. In a small mixing bowl, combine the sour cream, mayonnaise, mustard, sugar, and vinegar. Stir to mix well.
6. Pour the dressing over the potato mixture in the large bowl. Toss well to mix thoroughly.
7. Garnish with chopped parsley and sliced hard boiled eggs.
8. Refrigerate for several hours (preferably overnight) before serving.
